license_policy.naver: Naver says its fonts are free for all users including companies and can be used commercially except selling the font itself for a fee.
license_policy.google_fonts: Google Fonts FAQ says all Google Fonts are open source, free to use, and can be used commercially.
license_policy.sil_ofl: SIL OFL allows commercial use, modification, and redistribution, but not selling the font by itself.

fonts.name: Pretendard Variable

integration.html_link: <link rel="stylesheet" as="style" crossorigin href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/orioncactus/pretendard@v1.3.9/dist/web/variable/pretendardvariable-dynamic-subset.min.css" />

application.body_family: "Pretendard Variable", Pretendard, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Noto Sans KR", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif
application.heading_family: "Pretendard Variable", Pretendard, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Noto Sans KR", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif

fonts.tone_note: 가장 무난한 현대적 기본값. 제품형 UI, 랜딩, 포트폴리오에 잘 맞는다.

fonts.name: NanumSquare Neo

integration.html_link: <link href="https://hangeul.pstatic.net/hangeul_static/css/nanum-square-neo.css" rel="stylesheet">

fonts.tone_note: 직선적이고 브랜드 힘이 강하다. 메인 헤드라인과 카드 UI에 특히 강하다.

fonts.name: NanumSquare

integration.html_link: <link href="https://hangeul.pstatic.net/hangeul_static/css/nanum-square.css" rel="stylesheet">

fonts.tone_note: 반듯하고 친근한 스타트업 계열. 모바일 화면에서도 인상이 또렷하다.

fonts.name: NanumGothic

integration.html_link: <link href="https://hangeul.pstatic.net/hangeul_static/css/nanum-gothic.css" rel="stylesheet">

fonts.tone_note: 익숙하고 안정적인 본문용. 공지, 고객지원, 문서형 페이지에서 특히 안전하다.

fonts.name: Gmarket Sans

integration.style_tag:
<style>
@font-face {
  font-family: "Gmarket Sans";
  font-style: normal;
  font-weight: 300;
  src: url("https://script.gmarket.com/fonts/GmarketSansLight.woff2") format("woff2");
}
@font-face {
  font-family: "Gmarket Sans";
  font-style: normal;
  font-weight: 500;
  src: url("https://script.gmarket.com/fonts/GmarketSansMedium.woff2") format("woff2");
}
@font-face {
  font-family: "Gmarket Sans";
  font-style: normal;
  font-weight: 700;
  src: url("https://script.gmarket.com/fonts/GmarketSansBold.woff2") format("woff2");
}
</style>
integration.css_import: /* Gmarket Sans uses official @font-face declarations. See style_tag for a paste-ready snippet. */

application.body_family: "Gmarket Sans", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif
application.heading_family: "Gmarket Sans", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif

fonts.tone_note: 세련되고 깔끔한 브랜드 인상. 이커머스, 스타트업, 모바일 랜딩에 특히 잘 맞는다.

fonts.name: Spoqa Han Sans Neo

integration.html_link: <link href="https://spoqa.github.io/spoqa-han-sans/css/SpoqaHanSansNeo.css" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css">

application.body_family: "Spoqa Han Sans Neo", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif
application.heading_family: "Spoqa Han Sans Neo", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif

fonts.tone_note: UI와 숫자 가독성에 강한 정돈된 고딕체. 제품형 서비스와 운영 화면에 안정적이다.

fonts.name: Goorm Sans

integration.html_link:
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://statics.goorm.io" crossorigin="anonymous" />
<link rel="preload" as="style" crossorigin href="https://statics.goorm.io/fonts/GoormSans/v1.0.0/GoormSans.min.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://statics.goorm.io/fonts/GoormSans/v1.0.0/GoormSans.min.css" />

application.body_family: "Goorm Sans", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif
application.heading_family: "Goorm Sans", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif

fonts.tone_note: 한글과 영문 균형이 좋아 개발자 감성과 제품형 UI를 함께 잡기 좋다.

fonts.name: S-Core Dream
fonts.license: S-Core font license (commercial use allowed; font file modification restricted)

integration.setup_note: Commercial use is allowed on the official license page, but the same page also says the font files must be used as distributed and not modified. Because the official site does not provide a hosted webfont stylesheet, this package should treat S-Core Dream as not yet verified for automatic webfont embedding.

application.body_family: "S-Core Dream", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif
application.heading_family: "S-Core Dream", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif

fonts.tone_note: 9가지 굵기를 갖춘 깔끔한 고딕체. 발표 자료, 브랜드 소개, 굵기 대비가 중요한 화면에 유용하다.
avoid_for_ko: 웹폰트를 바로 붙여야 하는 초간단 프로토타입

fonts.name: IBM Plex Sans KR

application.heading_family: "IBM Plex Sans KR", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", system-ui, sans-serif

fonts.tone_note: 공학적이고 차분하다. B2B, 개발자 도구, 데이터 제품에 특히 잘 맞는다.

fonts.name: Noto Sans KR

integration.html_link: <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"><link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Sans+KR:wght@100..900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

application.heading_family: "Noto Sans KR", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", system-ui, sans-serif

fonts.tone_note: 글로벌 서비스에 쓰기 좋은 무채색 기본값. 언어 혼용 환경에서도 안정적이다.

fonts.name: MaruBuri

integration.html_link: <link href="https://hangeul.pstatic.net/hangeul_static/css/maru-buri.css" rel="stylesheet">

fonts.tone_note: 부드럽고 온기 있는 화면용 부리. 브랜드 스토리와 장문 콘텐츠에 힘을 준다.

fonts.name: Hahmlet

integration.html_link: <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"><link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Hahmlet:wght@100..900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

fonts.tone_note: 문학적이고 우아하다. 조금 더 개성이 있는 프리미엄 에디토리얼에 좋다.

fonts.name: Noto Serif KR

integration.html_link: <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"><link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif+KR:wght@200;300;400;500;600;700;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

fonts.tone_note: 정갈하고 공신력 있는 부리. 기관형, 법률형, 신뢰형 페이지에 안전하다.

fonts.name: Gowun Dodum

integration.html_link: <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"><link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Gowun+Dodum&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

application.heading_family: "Gowun Dodum", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif

fonts.tone_note: 부드럽고 잔잔하다. 웰니스, 라이프스타일, 커뮤니티류 화면에 온기를 준다.

fonts.name: Gowun Batang

integration.html_link: <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"><link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Gowun+Batang:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

fonts.tone_note: 시적인 여백감이 있다. 잔잔한 에세이, 감성 브랜드 저널과 잘 어울린다.

fonts.name: NanumSquareRound

integration.html_link: <link href="https://hangeul.pstatic.net/hangeul_static/css/nanum-square-round.css" rel="stylesheet">

fonts.tone_note: 동글고 경쾌하다. 교육, 가족형, 캐주얼 커뮤니티 서비스에 잘 맞는다.

fonts.name: Black Han Sans

integration.html_link: <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"><link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Black+Han+Sans&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

application.heading_family: "Black Han Sans", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif

fonts.tone_note: 타이틀 존재감이 강하다. 포스터, 이벤트, 캠페인 히어로에 좋다.

fonts.name: Do Hyeon

integration.html_link: <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"><link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Do+Hyeon&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

application.heading_family: "Do Hyeon", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif

fonts.name: 여기어때 잘난체

integration.html_link: <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://static.goodchoice.kr/fonts/jalnan/font.css">

fonts.name: NanumPen

fonts.tone_note: 메모, 후기, 강조 한 줄 같은 작은 포인트에 좋다.

fonts.name: Jua

fonts.name: Gaegu

integration.html_link: <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"><link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Gaegu:wght@300;400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

fonts.name: Single Day

integration.html_link: <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"><link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Single+Day&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
